changelog:
Fork patches A2:
- docker-compose service and container renamed to kiro-go-patch so it no longer collides with the upstream container name when both run on the same host.
- pull_policy: always added so docker compose up always picks up the latest image.
- README docker run examples updated to --name kiro-go-patch.

A1:
- Prompt filter logic catches Claude Code 2.x <system-reminder> blocks, x-anthropic-billing-header, ## Environment / ## auto memory sections; applied to system prompt AND user messages.
- Response model field preserves the exact id sent by the client (e.g. claude-opus-4-7-20251101).
- /v1/models returns canonical Anthropic dashed/dated ids; Kiro dotted form kept as alias.
- New /v1/responses endpoint compatible with OpenAI Responses API (Codex CLI), full streaming SSE event sequence.
- Dashboard refresh: clear stat cards (Available / Success Rate / Credits Used / Credits Total + remaining / Uptime), restrained single-palette modern style, account cards show status via colored left rail.
- i18n parity (zh + en) verified at 309 keys each.
